response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP, but lacks clear evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI solutions, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders — key requirements for this staff-level role.
strengths: Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling
Proven full-stack expertise across TypeScript, cloud (AWS), and scalable systems
Active open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of vector databases, RAG, or LLM optimization in work history
Resume uses name 'Szabo Bogdan' but candidate is 'Sarah Smith' — potential identity mismatch
Limited evidence of enterprise customer-facing technical leadership or production AI deployment at scale
